scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @workspace/orgni run build && BASE_PATH=/app/ pnpm --filter @workspace/orgni-app run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build:vercel && pnpm run collect:public
scripts.collect:public: rm -rf public && mkdir -p public/app && cp -r artifacts/orgni/dist/public/. public/ && cp -r artifacts/orgni-app/dist/public/. public/app/
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
